title: Captain Antilles (disambiguation)
content:
The title '''Captain Antilles''' was held, at some point, by more than one person:

==Canon==
*'''[[Raymus Antilles]]''', was the [[captain]] of ''[[Tantive IV]]'' from the time of the [[Clone Wars]] until his [[death]], and also according to [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|Episode IV: A New Hope]], the former owner of [[C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2]].
*'''[[Wedge Antilles]]''', who was not related to Raymus, held the rank of captain in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet]] during the last stages of the [[Galactic Civil War]].

==Legends==
*'''[[Raymus Antilles/Legends|Raymus Antilles]]''', referred to in some sources as '''Colton Antilles''', was the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']] from the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] until his death in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]
*'''[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]''', who was not related to Raymus, was a captain in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] from [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] to [[7 ABY/Legends|6.5 ABY]]

{{Disambig}}
